name: Lydall, Inc.
description: Lydall, Inc. is a global manufacturer of specialty engineered products and materials, primarily serving the thermal/acoustical and filtration/separation markets. With a history dating back to 1869, the company provides innovative nonwoven, membrane, and composite solutions for demanding industrial and automotive applications. Lydall's products are essential for heat shielding, acoustical barriers, and high-performance filtration systems. Headquartered in Manchester, Connecticut, the company operates globally with manufacturing facilities across North America, Europe, and Asia. Lydall was acquired by Unifrax (now Alkegen) in 2021, marking a significant transition in its long-standing corporate history.
